overrides.name: Albeni Bar
overrides.shortDescription: Caramel biscuit bar coated in rich milk chocolate. A premium indulgence in every bite.
overrides.description: Albeni is Ülker's premium chocolate bar — a harmonious layering of crunchy biscuit, smooth caramel, and velvety milk chocolate. Each bar is individually wrapped for freshness and designed to deliver a luxurious snacking experience.
overrides.ingredients: Milk chocolate (sugar, cocoa butter, whole milk powder, cocoa mass, emulsifier: soya lecithin, vanillin), wheat flour, caramel (glucose syrup, condensed milk, sugar, butter, salt), sugar, vegetable oil, salt, raising agent, emulsifier.
overrides.taste: Rich milk chocolate with sweet caramel undertones and a classic biscuit base.
overrides.texture: Crisp biscuit layer contrasts beautifully with soft caramel and a smooth chocolate shell.
overrides.storageInstructions: Store below 20°C in a dry place. Do not refrigerate — chocolate may bloom.
overrides.servingSuggestions: Ideal as an afternoon treat. Pairs excellently with espresso or a glass of cold milk.

overrides.name: Halley
overrides.shortDescription: Sandwich biscuit with marshmallow filling, coated in chocolate. A childhood favourite.
overrides.description: Halley stands as one of Ülker's most iconic creations — a signature sandwich biscuit filled with soft marshmallow and enrobed in a glossy chocolate coating. Uniquely indulgent yet approachable for all ages.
overrides.ingredients: Wheat flour, sugar, vegetable oil (palm oil), cocoa powder, glucose syrup, marshmallow (sugar, glucose syrup, modified starch, gelling agent: E440, natural flavour), cocoa mass, whole milk powder, emulsifier: soya lecithin, vanillin.
overrides.taste: A delightful blend of cocoa biscuit, sweet vanilla marshmallow, and rich chocolate.
overrides.texture: Firm biscuit shell gives way to pillowy marshmallow, all encased in smooth chocolate.
overrides.storageInstructions: Store in a cool, dry place. Best consumed within 3 days of opening.
overrides.servingSuggestions: A classic after-school snack. Exceptional when slightly chilled on warm days.

overrides.name: Biskrem
overrides.shortDescription: Crispy wafer filled with rich hazelnut cream. Simple perfection.
overrides.description: Biskrem is Ülker's classic hazelnut cream wafer — a straightforward yet deeply satisfying combination of crisp wafer sheets and smooth hazelnut paste. A perennial favourite in the wafer category.
overrides.ingredients: Sugar, vegetable oil (palm oil, sunflower oil), wheat flour, hazelnuts (7%), whey powder, emulsifier: soya lecithin, vanillin, raising agent: sodium bicarbonate.
overrides.taste: Sweet hazelnut with a background of toasted wafer — simple and satisfying.
overrides.texture: Crisp and light wafer layers with a smooth, dense hazelnut filling.
overrides.storageInstructions: Store in a cool, dry place. Protect from humidity to maintain crispness.
overrides.servingSuggestions: Great as a snack at any time of day. A perfect companion for hot beverages.

overrides.name: Rulo Pasta
overrides.shortDescription: Swiss roll cake with chocolate cream filling. Light, elegant, and irresistible.
overrides.description: Rulo Pasta is Ülker's beloved Swiss roll — a light sponge cake tightly rolled around a smooth chocolate cream filling. Its elegant spiral cross-section makes it as visually appealing as it is delicious.
overrides.ingredients: Wheat flour, sugar, eggs, vegetable oil, cocoa powder, skimmed milk powder, glucose syrup, raising agents, emulsifier: E471, salt, vanillin.
overrides.taste: Light vanilla sponge with a rich, smooth chocolate cream that dominates pleasantly.
overrides.texture: Fluffy sponge with a dense, fudgy cream — satisfying in every slice.
overrides.storageInstructions: Refrigerate after opening. Best consumed within 2 days.
overrides.servingSuggestions: Serve in slices as a dessert. Excellent with a scoop of ice cream.

overrides.name: gofret
overrides.shortDescription: Chocolate sandwich biscuit with cocoa cream filling. A bold, chocolatey indulgence.
overrides.description: Çokoprens is Ülker's double-hit of chocolate — a dark cocoa biscuit sandwich with a rich cocoa cream filling. Bold, intense, and satisfying for true chocolate lovers.
overrides.ingredients: Wheat flour, sugar, vegetable oil, cocoa powder (8%), glucose syrup, emulsifier: soya lecithin, raising agents (sodium bicarbonate, ammonium bicarbonate), salt, vanillin.
overrides.taste: Intensely chocolatey with a bittersweet cocoa profile and a sweet cream centre.
overrides.texture: Firm, crisp biscuit shells with a smooth, yielding cream filling.
overrides.storageInstructions: Store in a cool, dry place. Do not expose to direct heat.
overrides.servingSuggestions: Excellent dunked in cold milk. A great lunchbox treat for all ages.

overrides.name: Ülker Dark Chocolate 70%
overrides.shortDescription: Premium 70% dark chocolate tablet. Intense, sophisticated, and pure.
overrides.description: Crafted for the discerning palate, Ülker's 70% Dark Chocolate tablet is made with carefully selected cocoa beans and features a deep, complex flavour profile with subtle fruity notes and a long, satisfying finish.
overrides.ingredients: Cocoa mass (70%), sugar, cocoa butter, emulsifier: soya lecithin, vanilla extract.
overrides.taste: Bold and complex — dark berry and cherry notes followed by a lingering bitter-sweet cocoa depth.
overrides.texture: Smooth melt-in-the-mouth with a crisp initial snap.
overrides.storageInstructions: Store below 18°C in a cool, dry place away from strong odours.
overrides.servingSuggestions: Savour slowly as a premium standalone treat. Pairs beautifully with red wine or espresso.

overrides.name: Rondo
overrides.shortDescription: Airy, layered chocolate wafer bar with a light hazelnut cream. A classic icon.
overrides.description: Alpella is Ülker's celebrated airy chocolate bar — a delicate wafer structure filled with smooth hazelnut cream and coated in milk chocolate. Generations have enjoyed its distinctive light, melt-away experience.
overrides.ingredients: Sugar, vegetable oil (palm oil), wheat flour, hazelnuts (6%), cocoa butter, whole milk powder, cocoa powder, emulsifier: soya lecithin, vanillin.
overrides.taste: Light milk chocolate with a gentle hazelnut sweetness — airy and indulgent at once.
overrides.texture: Uniquely light and airy — the thin wafer layers dissolve almost instantly.
overrides.storageInstructions: Store below 20°C. Avoid humidity to maintain texture.
overrides.servingSuggestions: Perfect mid-morning treat. Also a lovely accompaniment to vanilla ice cream.

overrides.name: Caramel Twist
overrides.shortDescription: Soft caramel swirl coated in smooth milk chocolate. Decadent and luxurious.
overrides.description: Caramel Twist is Ülker's answer to premium caramel confectionery — a soft, chewy caramel centre with subtle salted notes, wrapped in silky milk chocolate. Each piece is a small luxury.
overrides.ingredients: Milk chocolate (sugar, cocoa butter, whole milk powder, cocoa mass, emulsifier: soya lecithin, vanillin), caramel filling (glucose syrup, condensed whole milk, sugar, butter, sea salt), emulsifier: soya lecithin.
overrides.taste: Balanced sweetness with a lightly salted caramel depth and rich chocolate finish.
overrides.texture: Yielding, chewy caramel centre encased in a smooth chocolate shell.
overrides.servingSuggestions: A sophisticated after-dinner treat. Excellent as a gift or premium entertaining option.

overrides.name: Kremalı dark
overrides.shortDescription: Classic cream-filled wafer. Light, crispy, and irresistibly snackable.
overrides.description: Kremalı Gofret is the quintessential Turkish wafer — a multi-layer crispy wafer filled with a light, airy vanilla cream. Universally loved and unmistakably Ülker.
overrides.ingredients: Sugar, vegetable oil (palm oil), wheat flour, skimmed milk powder, emulsifier: soya lecithin, vanillin, raising agent: sodium bicarbonate, salt.
overrides.taste: Light vanilla sweetness with a delicate cream softness.
overrides.texture: Airy, crispy wafer with a yielding, cloud-like cream layer.
overrides.storageInstructions: Store in a cool, dry place. Best consumed promptly after opening.
overrides.servingSuggestions: An all-day snack. Perfect for children and adults alike.

overrides.name: Ülker Kek
overrides.shortDescription: Soft, moist individual cake with a golden crust. A classic homestyle bake.
overrides.description: Ülker Kek brings the warmth of home baking to a convenient individual format. Each golden cake is soft, moist, and perfectly portioned — ideal for any moment that calls for a gentle treat.
overrides.ingredients: Wheat flour, sugar, eggs, vegetable oil, skimmed milk powder, raising agents (sodium bicarbonate, ammonium bicarbonate, diphosphates), emulsifier: E471, salt, natural flavouring.
overrides.taste: Classic vanilla sponge with a lightly sweet, comforting warmth.
overrides.texture: Soft, moist crumb with a delicate golden crust.
overrides.storageInstructions: Store in a cool, dry place. Best consumed on day of opening.
overrides.servingSuggestions: Perfect with morning tea or as an afternoon pick-me-up.
